message:
fix(ufunc): handle nanvar ddof>=valid_count, fix nanmin all-NaN axis, fix minimum/maximum -0.0 tie-break, fix digamma(±0)

- Return NaN from nanvar when ddof >= number of valid (non-NaN) elements
  instead of dividing by zero — matches NumPy behavior
- Fix nanmin with axis: return NaN for axis slices where all values are
  NaN instead of returning +Infinity (the fill sentinel)
- Fix minimum/maximum binary ops: when lhs == rhs, return rhs to match
  NumPy's -0.0 propagation convention (min(-0, +0) → -0, max(-0, +0) → +0)
- Fix digamma at ±0: return +Infinity for -0.0 and -Infinity for +0.0,
  matching the mathematical sign convention
- Replace unwrap_or_else(unreachable) with .expect() in unique_inverse
  and unique_all
- Add nanvar_ddof_larger_than_valid_count_returns_nan test
- Fix conformance assertion formatting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
